content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates multiple specific, timely reads of how the client is showing up beyond content. In Turn 4, the coach catches the micro-pause before 'nothing, really' and names it explicitly — a textbook linguistic/somatic read at the exact moment it matters. Turn 10 reads the caveat 'it's not a big deal' as a possibly-introjected voice, distinguishing the said from the shown. Turn 14 ('are you checking right now, or telling me?') is a precise read of the client's epistemic stance — naming the difference between rehearsed reassurance and felt experience. Turn 12 invites somatic tracking. Reads precede or constitute the questions rather than being blind inquiries. The happiness-filter / managing-to-stay-fine pattern is being read in real time through linguistic caveats, even if not labeled by name. Misses: the coach doesn't yet name the pattern aggregate (walking-on-eggshells / happiness filter) as it accumulates, and could have read the laugh in Turn 5 more directly. But the visible reads are specific, AoA-flavored, and timely.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Diagnostic question, no explicit read named yet — but well-aimed at the surface report."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the pause before 'nothing, really' — specific linguistic/somatic read at the exact moment of the hedge."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Hypothetical question; not grounded in an explicit read."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Good diagnostic but no read named."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads 'it's not a big deal' as a possibly-introjected voice — distinguishes said from shown, names the caveat."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Directs attention to somatic signature explicitly."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Sharp read: 'checking right now or telling me?' — names the rehearsing/reassuring stance precisely."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["the-happiness-filter", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["walking-on-eggshells (pattern not yet named as evidence accumulates)"],
  "notes": "Strong read-led inquiry. Coach consistently grounds questions in something noticed rather than asking blind."
}
